reviews.review_description: It is fun but still real annoying sometimes
Worst game I’ve ever played most of the guns don’t even work super quiet overall rate 1 star

I can’t rank this game because I am not able to play it. There is a glitch that does not let me do the tutorial or a real match. I want to play this game so if the devs are reading this, please fix it.

developer_response.body: Please share the details for the glitch! I want to fix that. Reach out at our Discord server (https://discord.gg/BEdWsry) or over email at support@dreamteam-mobile.com

reviews.review_description: Underrated

This game is wild!!!
I absolutely love how it plays. 
Having a laser grappling hook and being able to jump and swing from things all while shooting?!  This is an incredible experience. 

I would love to see a score or see who did the best and worst after each match, but maybe thats in a different game mode. I dunno, either way, for being a free game; this is a must download!!

developer_response.body: The score is shown automatically after each death and once every match is over (all game modes). If it doesn't happen to you, try to hit the X button (left controller) and you will see the score at any point in time. Let me know how it goes and if you still cannot see the score, please connect with me in our Discord, I'll troubleshoot that with you: https://battlearenavr.net/discord

reviews.review_description: Some dude called me a black monkey

developer_response.body: I'm sorry to hear that you faced some bad people in the game. Please contact me over discord and I'll be happy to review the claim and ban the unethical players: https://battlearenavr.net/discord

reviews.review_description: This game is so cool! They even have tournaments every now and then! They also have a player that calls himself the king of swing... And he's right! He's really really great at swinging like Spider-Man! That is what I like about this game you get a grappling laser and you get to swing around and shoot players! It's so fun that I recommend this game!

I like gun games, however, I don’t like this game. The first game I joined I had no fun in, I wasn’t able to talk nor hear people, and people would just go through the walls and the floors. It just didn’t seem cool considering I just started playing and it was already becoming unfair. Ultimately I don’t think this game was a good game, you can get it if you want because you may have a different experience. But I didn’t like this game

developer_response.body: Hi IcyBeast, sorry to hear about your experience of people walking through the walls. It sounds like you reproduced a bug when your game joined one map while the server connected you to another. Would you be able to restart the game and try again and see if it happens again? If you hit the "Join Active Game" button, there is also a chance you were placed on a beta map (Ganymede) which was under development, and that where you could have seen people walking through walls, and that shouldn't be an issue any longer because the map has been released just yesterday!

reviews.review_description:
I got the game like 2 weeks ago without playing it. My expectations were low (sorry devs, I thought it was just another shoot'em up, same recipe different graphics blahblah blah).
I was wrong.
I had so much fun right away!
Swinging around gives you so much freedom in VR. And once you really get a hand of it it's even better. 
There is always people to play against, bots or not I don't care as I don't see the difference and it gives me that 10 minutes rush I want when starting the game.
Good job!

developer_response.body:
Thanks, ec9! I'm glad you liked the game and gave it a try. I have many more features planned to improve grappling mechanics, including grapple to other players, grapple break, also new weapons, maps, and modes. Feel free to vote or suggest new ideas: https://battlearenavr.net/feedback

And join our amazing Discord community and weekly tournaments, they are even more fun to grapple around, grapple everywhere:
https://discord.gg/BEdWsry

reviews.review_title: Want dead hook but u poor? Play this
reviews.review_description: This is amazing to train at or prepare for another vr game called dead hook
This game isn’t good walking is the slowest thing imaginable and in practice bots can hit you from the other side of the map and people in the online mode are so toxic
I’d love to see this get updates. It’s my go-to game as of recent. The grappling mechanic makes the gameplay fast and unique and the guns are great.

developer_response.body:
Thanks, Zenaero for the feedback! I try to release a weekly update including new features from our roadmap. Feel free to add new items or vote for existing features:

https://battlearenavr.net/feedback

This week we have released game settings and bots difficulty levels to make your game play challenging and improve the skills to participate in our weekly tournament! See you I the game!

reviews.review_description: So in the game there is this glitch that won’t let me join tutorial.

developer_response.body: Please share the details for the glitch! I want to fix that. Reach out at our Discord server (https://discord.gg/BEdWsry) or over email at support@dreamteam-mobile.com

reviews.review_description: this game is literally the BEST movement fps the way you fly like spider man and chain weapon combos to get the kill is amazing genuinely obsessed with this game but add more stuff to buy like weapon skins and maybe add getting ammo or health each kill this will make the game the very best and also add a battle pass with more cosmetics and more maps and this one is my favorite add something like a knife to spin around on the hand you use for your shield every time you make a shaking motion it spins and make it very sensitive so it can constantly spin around while your flying around and make this act like a built in melee but when you have the sword out it goes away but anyways goated game

this games idea is very good, however, it has pretty bad execution. ill come back to it after sometime to see it after updates but as of right now i would advoid it and get Gun Raiders if your looking for a good shooter on app lab

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and thank you for advertising other games in review dedicated for Battle Arena VR. This game is great, gives you the opportunity to fly in VR and shoot your evenmies. No motion sickness, great effects, amazing community! I think Dire Blaster is the most beautiful gun ever created, try it. I love the revolver too, and ricochet gives you the opportunity to score more hits. It's great to have you with us, feel free to vote for our features at the user forum to make the game even better:
https://battlearenavr.net/feedback 

Please, also join our tournaments and weekly challenges, we have a prize every week, more details on our Discord, our community is great:
https://discord.gg/BEdWsry

All the useful links are here:
https://battlearenavr.net

reviews.review_title: If you’re left handed don’t even bother
reviews.review_description: Can’t switch dominant hand,guns are horrible,the entire menu is full of random unnecessary sh1t. My recommendation to the devs,simplify the menu,make holsters,have the ability to drop weapons,drop the I want to be the next fortnite sh1t with every element of the fortnite menu stolen by the menu of this awful game and most importantly LET US SWITCH DOMINANT HAND

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: This feature is now implemented and you can switch your dominant hand from right to left. Please give it a try and let us know if it works for you. 
-------
Thanks for the feedback, I've got a few requests to have the ability to switch hands and going to focus on this feature. Please vote for it: https://feedback.userreport.com/c008337e-def2-46db-b7aa-41e160772adb/#idea/327942

As for the reference to "fortnite", I have never played that game and probably won't, coz it's not available for VR, so can ensure you that game is not used as a reference for my menu. Please let me know what exactly is extra in the menu, I have there only buttons to control bots and change a team. Not sure what is extra there. Please provide more details.

reviews.review_title: Has some potential, but sadly isn't fun
reviews.review_description: This game looked fun, but every match I joined had nothing but hackers who were walking through the sky, insta-shooting you the second you were in their sight, and walking through walls. It really doesn't help that the guns make almost no sound, so if someone is shooting at you, you are pretty much garenteed to die. This game has some potential, but I can't recommend it in this state.

developer_response.body: Unfortunately, there is a known issue when players from two different maps are merged into a single "room" making them walk in the air and through walls. We have just released an update to fix the issue, please check our latest 2.24.394 and come to our tournament to challenge everyone!

reviews.review_description: I got this game to play with my friends whenever I join a game I am still in the lobby no matter what I try please fix this

developer_response.body: Please share the details for the glitch! I want to fix that. Reach out at our Discord server (https://discord.gg/BEdWsry) or over email at support@dreamteam-mobile.com

reviews.review_description: I recently downloaded this game and I’ve had a lot of fun, there’s good amount of maps that are enjoyable and the weapons are balanced as well. The only problem I have is that I can’t play with other people. Like every server there are just a bunch of bots to play against so it gets boring really quick

I haven't tried the game yet but what is the single player portion of the game?

Respond to dev: 
Thanks alot, I'll check it out! :)

developer_response.body: Hi ChickyPopcornAndSaus, the single-player is playing with bots. You have control over bots (quantity). Pick a game and fight with bots as a single-player mode. I'll be happy to help you with the game or answer additional questions, join our Discord: https://discord.gg/BEdWsry
